image.title: NAM Vannoni, M McKee, JC Semenza, C Bonell, D Stuckler

item.title: Using volunteered geographic information to assess mobility in the early phases of the COVID-19 pandemic: a cross-city time series analysis of 41 cities in 22 countries from March 2nd to 26th 2020.
